'''Ranes''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Admiral/Legends|admiral]] who at some point was [[Telekinesis/Legends#Choking powers|choked]] to death with [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] by either [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] or [[Antinnis Tremayne]].<ref name="TLF" />
